description: Single-chunk income statement with millions scale. Core scaling path: raw table values × 1 000 000, EPS exempted.
raw_text:
CONDENSED CONSOLIDATED STATEMENTS OF INCOME
(In millions, except per share data)
Three Months Ended March 31, 2026

Revenue                               50,000
Cost of revenue                       20,000
Gross profit                          30,000
Operating expenses:
  Research and development            10,000
  Sales and marketing                  3,000
  General and administrative           2,000
Total operating expenses              15,000
Operating income                      15,000
Net income                            10,000

Earnings per share:
  Basic                                 4.30
  Diluted                               4.25
